description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named RPI-CI that runs on push and pull request events for the master, devel, and release/v3.0.0 branches. The workflow consists of two jobs: RPI and RPI-Integration. The RPI job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the repository, sets up the environment, installs the RPI toolchain, runs F prime CI tests, copies tests, builds artifacts, and uploads them. The RPI-Integration job runs on a self-hosted runner, depends on the RPI job, downloads artifacts, runs integration tests, archives logs, and cleans up.
